## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Safety and scope

- [ ] No credentials, customer material, local paths, raw prompts, or private evidence are included.
- [ ] The change does not weaken validation, redaction, or no-fabrication boundaries without explicit review.
- [ ] Chinese and English public documentation were updated together when needed.

## Verification

- [ ] Focused tests
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `bash scripts/prepublish-check.sh`
